replies.author: @YuriFanLover-69
replies.text:
A massive exodus would be the best ending, as well as declaring several of the films they made under their umbrella "non-canon." (Star Wars, Indiana Jones, Marvel, Wish, Turning Red, etc.*) Though it would lead to bad publicity. (because you know the people who are fired are not gonna take it sitting down, and neither will the media.)

But they could likely rebuild it by hiring actually talented people, and making things the public will actually like. Hire genuine fans who love the IPs they bought and have them work on it. Then, a couple of years from now, people would be like "How did Disney even allow that previous era to even happen?"

Of course, that's only a pipe dream...

text:
Disney wanted IPs that had a male dominated fanbase, they spent Billons of Dollars purchasing Marvel and Lucasfilm and the people making the product would drive away those male fans.
Now they want those male fan back, too late, they will never come back to these IPs if Disney are still incharge and Disney can't sell these IPs cause they are now worthless and the stock will drop if they sell them which anger the stock holders.
Star War made billions of dollars from merch without any movies being made before disney, now no one is buy Star Wars merch.
As George said the have books, comics and video games, hundreds of stories to adapt, an easy way to make easy money, but disney didnt want to pay royalies to the creators and do it all in house.

It's too late for them to turn back. Worse, they think they're going to buy their way out of it, which only means they don't get it and still don't want to. Even their presstitutes like Variety are mocking males in these very articles claiming that they need them. 
Regarding SW, I was done a long time ago. I'm an EU only guy and was gone after that terrible Force Awakens movie. I know fans who were even gone before that because they saw the writing on the wall prior and nobody listened to them. The only way SW revives is if they lose the franchise and Disney SW is erased and the EU reinstated. 
Enough of Disney. They're done. Their movies are trash and slop. They promote endless agitprop. And have deviated from their core identity. They are creatively and morally bankrupt. We don't need them. There is no "culture war" win where Disney is the trophy. Nope.
